summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that AMGN is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $339.12. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 70.0%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $355.93 and a significant trendline confluence around $351.53 (formed by 2 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
